home.tagline: Instant delivery, zero hassle. Connect with local drivers, get competitive quotes, and track your package in real-time. Your perfect delivery solution is just a tap away.

features.title: Zero Commission
features.description: Direct pricing without any hidden fees. Pay exactly what the driver quotes.

features.title: Local Matching
features.description: Instant connections with drivers within your locality. Multiple competitive bids.

features.title: Instant Connect
features.description: Instant messaging with your delivery partner for seamless coordination.

features.title: Driver Freedom
features.description: Complete independence for drivers. No subscriptions or company constraints.

features.title: Real-Time Tracking
features.description: Monitor your delivery in real-time with precise GPS tracking and updates.

features.title: Secure Transactions
features.description: Payments held in secure escrow, released only upon successful delivery.

features.title: Quality Ratings
features.description: Comprehensive driver and service ratings to help you make informed choices.

features.title: Full Flexibility
features.description: Choose your ideal delivery partner based on price, convenience and ratings.

errorMessages.itemsValidation: Items field should only contain letters, spaces, and commas.
